news_items.headline: Mason Miller debuts crazy, Force-aided pitch ... with Grogu's help!
Mets call up No. 2 prospect A.J. Ewing for MLB debut
Yankees Mailbag: With eyes on October, what positions need an upgrade?
news_items.summary: The Yankees are 26-16 and currently in second place in the AL East. Let's open up the mailbag and answer some Yankees questions.

news_items.headline: Mets have reached now-or-never moment in fight to resuscitate their season
news_items.summary: The Mets have somewhat stabilized, but have lots of work to do if they hope to climb out of the massive hole they have dug for themselves.

news_items.headline: Yankees At-Bat of the Week: Trent Grisham (5/7)
news_items.summary: Grisham sparked a six-run rally with a clutch double last week against the Rangers.

news_items.headline: Is Yilber Diaz Ready?
news_items.summary: To be called up to the Majors.

news_items.headline: On The Horizon: Cubs vs. Braves series preview
news_items.summary: This is a matchup between the teams with the top two records in the league.

news_items.headline: Padres vs Brewers Prediction, Picks & Odds for Today's MLB Game
news_items.summary: San Diego's offense finally finds their fire in our Padres vs. Brewers picks, odds & expert predictions for Tuesday, May 12.

news_items.headline: Cubs vs Braves Prediction, Picks & Odds for Today's MLB Game
news_items.summary: Chicago finally finds some runs in our Cubs vs. Braves predictions and MLB picks on Tuesday, May 12.

news_items.headline: Phillies, Red Sox collide in middle of changing course
Braves place Murphy on IL with fractured finger, sign catcher León
Dodgers get OF Alek Thomas for prospect in trade with D-backs
Sources: Struggling Mets call up prospect Ewing
news_items.summary: The Mets are calling up their No. 2 prospect, outfielder A.J. Ewing, in hopes of sparking a struggling offense.

news_items.headline: Dodgers acquire OF Thomas in trade with D-backs
news_items.summary: The Dodgers have acquired outfielder Alek Thomas from the Diamondbacks in exchange for an outfield prospect, the teams announced Tuesday.

news_items.headline: Betts rejoins Dodgers after five weeks on IL
news_items.summary: Mookie Betts returned from the IL after a five-week absence on Monday, with the Dodgers hoping he can help spark a sluggish offense.

news_items.headline: Rangers scratch Eovaldi due to side tightness
news_items.summary: Rangers right-hander Nathan Eovaldi was scratched from his scheduled start Monday against the Diamondbacks night because of left side tightness.

news_items.headline: Weathers loses no-no in 7th, then Yanks lose game
news_items.summary: First, Ryan Weathers lost his no-hit bid. Not long after that, the Yankees lost the lead, eventually falling to the Orioles 3-2 in their fourth straight defeat.

news_items.headline: Braves' Kim set for '26 debut; White to 7-day IL
news_items.summary: Braves shortstop Ha-Seong Kim was activated from the IL, clearing the way for his season debut, while Eli White was placed on the seven-day concussion IL.

news_items.headline: Jays' Barger (elbow) to IL after 101.2 mph assist
news_items.summary: The Blue Jays put outfielder Addison Barger back on the injured list with right elbow inflammation and designated left-handed pitcher Eric Lauer for assignment.
